sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90993" key="prwtoku/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτο-κύμων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῡ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, </foreign>(<sense id="n90993.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κῦμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg007.perseus-grc1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pregnant for the first time</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔρωτος</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with</tr_> love, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
